evidence_boundary.description: Read-only historical-paper/current-policy entry-filter lab. It ranks candidate filters against realized current-policy rows and does not mutate scanner guardrails.
evidence_boundary.not_claimed: This is not fresh paper validation or production proof.

filters.description: Block short_term rows with entry fill degradation >= 15%.
filters.research_only_reason: Threshold sweep for the loss cohort's short_term execution-quality signal.

filters.description: Block short_term rows with entry fill degradation >= 16%.
filters.research_only_reason: Threshold sweep for the loss cohort's short_term execution-quality signal.

filters.description: Block short_term rows with fill >= 15%, quality < 60, or repeat deep-loss ticker.
filters.research_only_reason: Data-mined compound filter; research-only unless it passes fresh paper validation.

filters.description: Block short_term rows with entry fill degradation >= 10%.
filters.research_only_reason: Threshold sweep for the loss cohort's short_term execution-quality signal.

filters.description: Block short_term rows with entry fill degradation >= 12.5%.
filters.research_only_reason: Threshold sweep for the loss cohort's short_term execution-quality signal.

filters.description: Block short_term rows with fill degradation >= 15% or quality score below 60.
filters.research_only_reason: Compound filter from the two strongest loss-cohort entry-quality signals.

filters.description: Block short_term rows with entry fill degradation >= 14%.
filters.research_only_reason: Threshold sweep for the loss cohort's short_term execution-quality signal.

filters.description: Block rows with entry fill degradation >= 15%.
filters.research_only_reason: Threshold was selected after observing the current-policy loss cohort.

filters.description: Block tickers that appear at least twice in the <= -50% loss cohort.
filters.research_only_reason: Uses loss-cohort ticker clusters and must be validated out of sample.

filters.description: Block short_term rows for tickers that appear at least twice in the <= -50% loss cohort.
filters.research_only_reason: Uses loss-cohort ticker clusters and must be validated out of sample.

filters.description: Block rows with quality score below 60.
filters.research_only_reason: Threshold was selected after observing the current-policy loss cohort.

filters.description: Block short_term rows with quality score below 60.
filters.research_only_reason: Targets the loss cohort's short_term concentration.

filters.description: Block short_term rows with entry fill degradation >= 17.5%.
filters.research_only_reason: Threshold sweep for the loss cohort's short_term execution-quality signal.

filters.description: Block short_term rows with entry fill degradation >= 20%.
filters.research_only_reason: Threshold sweep for the loss cohort's short_term execution-quality signal.

decision_summary.recommended_next_action: Paper-test the best candidate filters on fresh scans before changing promoted scanner guardrails.

pass_bar: candidate-blocked rows must be net negative or include at least 2 losses <= -50%
lost fresh winners must not exceed fresh losses avoided
fail_bar: candidate only works on historical paper rows
fresh blocked rows include more winners than losers
paper_validation_plan.operator_action: Tag matching paper candidates for review/monitoring; do not block live scanner output yet.
